description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian figure positioned in a seated or crouched posture, with the head slightly bowed and arms resting on the knees. The figure has a distinct, rounded head with short hair and is dressed in layered clothing, including a jacket and pants. The clothing appears to be loose-fitting, with visible folds and creases, and the figure is situated on a flat surface that may represent a mat or ground covering. The overall form is stylized, with simplified anatomical features and a somewhat exaggerated head-to-body ratio. The figure's shoes are visible, and the hands are placed together in front, suggesting a contemplative or resting pose. The asset is surrounded by large, angular, dark structures that do not appear to be part of the pedestrian but may be environmental context or rendering artifacts.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian figure is seated or crouched with arms resting on the knees, wearing layered clothing and shoes, and featuring a rounded head with short hair.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the front, with the head bowed and hands together, seated on a flat surface beneath large angular structures.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the profile of the head and body, with the arms and legs bent and the layered clothing more visible.
description_view_2: The top-down view shows the rounded head and the angular structures above, with the figure's body mostly obscured.
description_view_3: A rear or oblique view, mostly shadowed, with the back of the head and part of the clothing visible, and the angular structures dominating the scene.
attribute_clothing_type: casual jacket and pants with a shirt underneath
attribute_posture: seated with arms resting on knees and head bowed
